title: Veinmine & Autosmelt Enchantments
description: Adds Veinmine and Autosmelt Enchantments with support for Enchantments Encore
body:
Adds the Veinmine & Smelting enchantments respectively.

You do _**NOT**_ need **Veinminer** or **Veinminer Enchantment** installed. This **replaces** and combines the datapacks

**Veinmine** lets you mine ore-veins with a single block break if they are connected.

**Smelting** automatically smelts the raw ores for you to pick up.
# 

Both enchantments can be found in Enchantment tables, and **Smelting** can also be obtained through loot chests & villager trading

![Automatically Smelted after using Veinmine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c9353d175e5cb98d9c3c78df5cce61291766148.png)

![Example Enchant with other Custom Enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35ed2a0a6162255acadcc0e4069d09f03bff05f7.png)

This datapack is a rewrite/update and fix to [**Veinminer**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer) & [**Veinminer Enchantment**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer-enchantment) from [**Miraculixx**](https://modrinth.com/user/Miraculixx) and [**Smelting**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/smelting-enchantment) from [**lullaby6**](https://modrinth.com/user/lullaby6) to make sure it works with Veinminer along with changes to the behavior for consistency

Also made sure it works with the [**Enchantments Encore**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-encore) datapack by [**Explorer's Eden**](https://modrinth.com/organization/explorers-eden) (Range checks etc for their Crab Claw enchantment)

# 

Works as of right now in **Singleplayer** & in **Multiplayer** 1.21.2-1.21.8
